name: ExamPQA
role: Lead Brand Strategist, Logo & Identity Designer
desc: A clear, trustworthy identity for an exam-prep platform, with a guideline system built so a lean team could implement it consistently at speed. The mark communicates accuracy and achievement — built for students, teachers, and institutional partners alike.
brief: A clear, trustworthy identity for an exam-prep platform, with a guideline system built so a lean team could implement it consistently at speed. The mark communicates accuracy and achievement — built for students, teachers, and institutional partners alike.
